findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy
findings.description: The response does not include the 'Content-Security-Policy' header.
findings.remediation: Define a Content-Security-Policy that restricts script, style, and object sources to trusted origins to mitigate XSS and data injection.

findings.title: Missing X-Frame-Options
findings.description: The response does not include the 'X-Frame-Options' header.
findings.remediation: Set 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' or 'SAMEORIGIN' (or use frame-ancestors in CSP) to prevent clickjacking.

findings.title: Missing X-Content-Type-Options
findings.description: The response does not include the 'X-Content-Type-Options' header.
findings.remediation: Set 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to stop browsers from MIME-sniffing responses away from the declared content type.

findings.title: Missing Referrer-Policy
findings.description: The response does not include the 'Referrer-Policy' header.
findings.remediation: Set a Referrer-Policy such as 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin' to avoid leaking sensitive URL data to third parties.

findings.title: Missing Strict-Transport-Security
findings.description: The response does not include the 'Strict-Transport-Security' header.
findings.remediation: Set 'Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains' to enforce HTTPS and prevent SSL-stripping attacks.

findings.title: Missing Permissions-Policy
findings.description: The response does not include the 'Permissions-Policy' header.
findings.remediation: Define a Permissions-Policy to restrict access to sensitive browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation, etc.).

findings.title: Server header discloses technology info
findings.description: The 'Server' header reveals backend technology details that can help an attacker fingerprint the stack.
findings.remediation: Suppress or genericize the 'Server' header at the server/proxy level.

findings.title: No login form detected
findings.description: Automatic form discovery did not find a login form on this page. Use --login-url to point directly at the login page for deeper checks.

findings.title: No reflected XSS detected in GET parameter 'id'
findings.description: Tested parameter 'id' with 4 payloads; no unencoded reflection observed.

findings.title: Error-based SQL injection in parameter 'id'
findings.description: Injecting SQL metacharacters into 'id' surfaced a database error message, indicating unsanitized input reaching a SQL query.
findings.evidence: Payload: ' | Matched signature: 'you have an error in your sql syntax'
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries / prepared statements for all database access; never concatenate user input into SQL. Disable verbose DB error output in production.

findings.title: robots.txt exposed
findings.description: robots.txt is accessible and may reveal paths not meant for public discovery.
findings.remediation: Review robots.txt to ensure it doesn't reveal sensitive paths; note it is not a security control.

findings.title: .env configuration file exposed
findings.description: A .env file is publicly accessible, potentially exposing database credentials, API keys, and secrets.
findings.remediation: Store .env outside the web root and block access to dotfiles at the web server level.
